description: Underground pipe hairline crack — Tank A1. ~60L petrol lost before detection.
Pump P2 electronic meter unit burned out — 2-day downtime, estimated revenue loss.
Monthly petrol tank evaporation loss (summer) — Tanks A1 & A2 combined.
Cash register discrepancy — suspected internal theft. Under investigation by management.
Diesel sold at outdated price (65 AFN) for 1 full day after price update to 67 AFN. Loss on 1,300L.
Tank A2 inlet valve seal failure — estimated 48L petrol lost before emergency repair.
CNG compressor bearing fault — output reduced by 20% for 3 days. Repair + lost revenue.
Summer heat evaporation increase — petrol tanks A1 & A2. Calculated from monthly inventory.
Pump P3 nozzle seal failure — pump offline for 1 day, estimated revenue loss included.
CNG sold below cost price for 2 days due to system price-update propagation lag.
Diesel overflow during PUR-011 delivery — Tank B1 overfill. ~43L spilled and unrecoverable.
Hassan Al-Rashid bad debt write-off — credit balance of 12,400 AFN deemed unrecoverable.
Premium petrol introductory promotional discount loss — sold 60L below cost.
Pump P1 display panel malfunction — recalibration cost + minor downtime.
Tank B2 fitting failure during refill — ~34L diesel lost.
Petrol evaporation — June heat (summer peak). Monthly inventory reconciliation.
Petrol sold at June price (70 AFN) on July 1 before system update. Loss on 2,600L.
Pump P3 solenoid valve failure — offline 8 hours, estimated 40 customers lost.
Minor diesel drip from Tank B1 drain valve — ~29L lost. Valve replaced same day.
July opening inventory variance — ~40L petrol unaccounted in physical count vs system.
